eng.definition: abrupt or offhand in speech or manner.
examples: His brusque manner was off-putting to some people.
The receptionist's brusque reply made me feel unwelcome.
Despite his brusque exterior, he was a kind person.

hin.definition: The action or process of changing or being changed
examples: हमें परिवर्तन का स्वागत करना चाहिए.
मैं अपने जीवन में कुछ परिवर्तन करना चाहता हूँ.
